systems.name: OpenCMS WebApp
systems.description: Browser-facing OpenCMS interface that hosts the desktop File Explorer, file-view tabs, and terminal surfaces.

containers.name: Desktop File Explorer UI
containers.description: Dense file list, selection state, context menus, dialogs, toasts, and pop-out controls.

containers.name: File Operation API
containers.description: Hono OpenAPI routes that validate and dispatch file mutations, uploads, downloads, and destination preflights.

containers.name: File Operation Engine
containers.description: Server-side File namespace logic that canonicalizes paths, checks boundaries, mutates bytes, writes recyclebin metadata, and reports affected directories.

components.name: Explorer Table
components.description: Renders file rows with metadata, selection controls, activation behavior, and context-menu targets.

components.name: Operation State Controller
components.description: Tracks selected sets, pending copy/cut state, action eligibility, dialogs, and source-pane cleanup after pop-out.

components.name: Route Validator
components.description: Validates request schema, basename rules, confirmation fields, and stable error-code mapping.

components.name: Boundary Guard
components.description: Resolves canonical paths, rejects traversal and symlink escapes, and handles external writable destination preflight.

components.name: Recyclebin Manager
components.description: Moves deleted targets into repo-local recyclebin and writes restore metadata.

relationships.description: Selection, activation, context-menu, and pop-out events update operation state.
Validated UI operations call generated SDK methods backed by file routes.
Routes delegate filesystem safety checks before mutation or streaming.
Confirmed delete operations use recyclebin manager after boundary validation.
Normalized operation results drive affected-directory refresh and tab/pane reconciliation.
